case_title: CHARLIE JOHNSON VS. MICHAEL E MAYO ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, CHARLIE DELLER, BENJAMIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAYO, MICHAEL E DURAN, GUILLERMO $9,102.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,217.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-08-2019 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-08-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-08-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF CHARLIE JOHNSON IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF BENJANMIN DELLER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MICHAEL E. MAYO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GUILLERMO DURAN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
